title: get event index list
description: Verify GET /Event/Index returns 200 with a list of events rendered in the view under normal conditions.

title: post create event success
description: Verify POST /Event/Create with valid required fields creates a new event and redirects (302) to /Event/Index where the new event is displayed.

title: post create event validation error
description: Verify POST /Event/Create with missing required fields returns 200 with validation errors shown in the create form view.

title: get edit event form success
description: Verify GET /Event/Edit/{id} with existing event id returns 200 with the edit form populated with event data.

title: get edit event form not found
description: Verify GET /Event/Edit/{id} with non-existent event id returns 404 NotFound.

title: post edit event success
description: Verify POST /Event/Edit/{id} with valid data updates the event and redirects (302) to /Event/Index where the updated event is shown.

title: post edit event validation error
description: Verify POST /Event/Edit/{id} with missing required fields returns 200 with validation errors in the edit form view.

title: post edit event not found
description: Verify POST /Event/Edit/{id} with non-existent event id returns 404 NotFound.

title: post delete event success
description: Verify POST /Event/Delete/{id} with existing event id deletes the event and redirects (302) to /Event/Index where the event no longer appears.

title: post delete event not found
description: Verify POST /Event/Delete/{id} with non-existent event id returns 404 NotFound.
